title: <episode title>

context.summary: Status-aware episode continuity memory. Planned chunks are future setup, not completed facts.

instructions: Direct-load current/previous episode chunk when token-safe; compress older episodes to continuity bullets.
forbidden_uses: do not treat planned future chunks as completed facts

focus.conflict_resolution: previous episode ending beats older archive summaries

timing.summary: Episode act/beat order if available; planned means setup only.

lifecycle_policy.planned: Future/setup only: logline, promise, setup/payoff hints; not completed facts.
lifecycle_policy.active: Current episode may be loaded full/direct if token-safe.
lifecycle_policy.completed: Continuity facts: ending state, unresolved hooks, character changes, constraints.
lifecycle_policy.archived: Not canon; use only as reference_only/inspiration when explicitly selected.

retrieval_text: episode_chunk <episode>; status planned active completed archived controls truth; continuity facts, ending state, character deltas, open threads, payoffs; planned future chunks are setup only, not completed facts.
